title: Galley-La Inspects the Merry
description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this part follows Kaku, Luffy, Iceburg, Nami, Usopp. Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There are customers at the front door.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Should I tell them to leave?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: NMA... tell them I'm not here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold on a second, iceberg- Run.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: nfufufufufufufufufufu... I knew you would be here.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: NMA--!! Long time no see, Kougii.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Don't kick me out just yet.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: I don't like you. Go away.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I have some good news for you.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Let's go to some- where private first...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: These guys are so annoy- ing...

summary: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
